title: Ransomware Response
steps: ["Disconnect affected machines from network immediately - pull ethernet and disable WiFi", "Do NOT power off machines - preserve forensic evidence", "Contact Tech Jordan (615-555-0162) and Principal Johnson", "Determine scope: which machines are encrypted? Check SIS server LMS file shares", "If SIS is affected: switch to paper attendance and gradebook immediately", "Contact cyber insurance carrier: Policy #EDU-2026-4491 Nashville Cyber Insurance 615-555-0300", "Restore from Synology NAS backup (14-day retention) - verify backups are clean before restoring", "Notify parents via SchoolMessenger if student data may be affected", "File police report with Metro Nashville PD", "FERPA breach notification if student records accessed: 60-day clock starts"]
notes: Cyber insurance requires notification within 24 hours

title: Internet Outage Recovery
steps: ["Verify outage: check Fortinet dashboard at 10.0.1.2", "Check ISP status page: Comcast Business status.xfinity.com", "If ISP outage: call Comcast Business Support 800-391-3000 Account #7742891", "Activate backup hotspot: Verizon MiFi in Tech Jordan desk drawer", "Notify staff via PA system: internet is down use offline materials", "If extended (>2 hours): cancel any online testing switch to paper", "Cloud services affected: Google Workspace Canvas SchoolMessenger", "SIS and AD still work locally on internal network"]
notes: Comcast SLA: 4-hour response for business accounts

title: SIS Server Failure
steps: ["Check server status: ping 10.0.1.10 and check console in server room", "If hardware failure: contact Dell ProSupport 800-456-3355 Service Tag: JKL9876", "Switch to paper attendance immediately - distribute paper forms from main office", "Notify teachers via PA: PowerSchool is down use paper gradebooks", "Check Synology backup at 10.0.1.50 for most recent backup", "If data loss suspected: do NOT attempt to fix - call Dell and preserve drives", "ETA for Dell on-site: next business day (ProSupport Plus contract)"]
notes: Dell ProSupport Plus - next business day on-site

title: Active Directory Down
steps: ["No one can log in to any computer if AD is down", "Check AD server console in server room: 10.0.1.5", "Restart AD service: open Services.msc restart Active Directory Domain Services", "If server unresponsive: check power UPS and network cable", "Temporary workaround: cached credentials allow recently logged-in users to continue", "If server dead: boot from backup - last known good config on Synology", "Notify all staff: use personal devices for email (Google Workspace works without AD)"]
notes: AD affects: SIS login WiFi auth file shares. Does NOT affect Google email.

title: Data Breach Response
steps: ["Identify what data was accessed and how many records affected", "Contain: revoke compromised credentials change passwords disable affected accounts", "Preserve evidence: screenshot logs export access logs do NOT delete anything", "Notify Principal Johnson and VP Martinez immediately", "Contact cyber insurance: Policy #EDU-2026-4491 615-555-0300", "If student records (FERPA): 60-day notification clock starts NOW", "If payment data (PCI-DSS): notify PaySchools and card brands within 72 hours", "Draft parent notification letter - template in main office shared drive", "File report with Metro Nashville PD", "Engage forensic investigator through cyber insurance carrier"]
notes: FERPA and PCI-DSS have different notification timelines

title: WiFi Network Down
steps: ["Check Aruba controller dashboard at 10.0.1.3", "Verify core switch is operational: 10.0.1.1", "Try restarting Aruba controller: power cycle unit in server room", "If single AP down: check physical AP unit and ethernet connection", "Notify affected area via PA: WiFi is down in [area] use ethernet or hotspot", "Deploy backup hotspot for critical needs (testing etc)"]
notes: Most classrooms have no ethernet drops - WiFi-only

title: Security Camera System Down
steps: ["Check Verkada dashboard: cloud management portal", "If internet-dependent: verify internet gateway is up", "Check local NVR power and network in server room", "Contact Verkada support: 844-837-5232", "Notify Security Dave immediately - increase physical patrols", "If cameras down during active incident: rely on human observers and radio"]
notes: Cameras are critical during any physical security incident

title: Fire Near Science Lab
steps: ["Evacuate Room 215 and adjacent rooms (209 210) immediately", "HAZMAT ALERT: Room 215 contains hydrochloric acid isopropyl alcohol and acetone", "Do NOT use water on chemical fire - use dry chemical extinguisher", "Shut gas supply: yellow valve in utility room behind cafeteria", "Notify fire department: chemicals present in Room 215 science lab", "Evacuate entire Floor 2 west wing via West Stairwell to Door 1", "Keep students upwind of any smoke - chemical fumes are toxic", "Dr. Franklin (Room 215) knows chemical inventory - find them for fire dept briefing"]
notes: SDS binder on lab desk has full chemical inventory
